steps.notes: Queried Notion AI Brief Story Pool for Candidate rows with Date Added >= 2026-06-05. Found 18 fresh candidates spanning all 7 clients. actions: notion_exec: POST /data_sources/fd2f7118-384a-8316-b6ad-070f5e9ee029/query with filter Status=Candidate AND Date Added on_or_after 2026-06-05

steps.notes: All 7 client briefs tailored successfully via sequential one-client-per-sub-agent spawns. Incserv (5 stories), M&T Bank (5), Brown Advisory (5), Alpine Associates (5), KPS Life (4), ChristianaCare (5), Luna Diabetes (5). Each opens with 'why this matters now' per QARC-PROOF feedback. All hard sensitivities honored: KPS framed as embedded-expert leverage, ChristianaCare through patient safety, Luna as lean team no specific figures, Alpine through activist dislocation lens, M&T no pure capital markets. Total 34 stories selected across 7 briefs from 18 candidates.

All 7 client briefs rendered as verified one-page PDFs via the Keel3 render script. Incserv (5, zoom 0.82), M&T Bank (5, zoom 0.82), Brown Advisory (5, zoom 0.82), Alpine Associates (5, zoom 0.78), KPS Life (4, zoom 0.78), ChristianaCare (4, zoom 0.85 - dropped 5th story to fit), Luna Diabetes (5, zoom 0.78). All verified single-page before commit.
